falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a reversal rather than continuation of the pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 (key resistance from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking above this level would validate a bullish trend continuation, invalidating the HOLD by showing clear momentum against the original bottom pattern's bearish context.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the S&P 500 declines by 40% compared to the 2024 August bottom's confirmation day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such weak volume would indicate lack of participation in any potential breakout/move, falsifying the pattern's validity and proving the HOLD verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
